items.html: *The matter of the Nesirah [sawing apart]: at first, through the Mochin of Katnut [smallness], they were attached back to back, since their posteriors are still Dinim [judgments] of the name Elokim. Afterwards He cast sleep upon ZA [Zeir Anpin], and the Mochin withdraw from him again, and he remains in the discernment of Yenika [suckling] — for that is the sleep. And understand this very well.
